languages.text: "Значит, отец все еще доверяет тебе? Его доверие, как и кровные узы, для тебя ничего не значит?"
"So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"
languages.original_text: "Значит, отец все еще доверяет тебе? Его доверие, как и кровные узы, для тебя ничего не значит?"

traits.locale_text: "So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"
"So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"
"So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"

languages.text: «Entonces, ¿su padre aún confía en usted? ¿Valora su confianza tan poco como su lazo de sangre?».
languages.original_text: "So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"

traits.locale_text: «Entonces, ¿su padre aún confía en usted? ¿Valora su confianza tan poco como su lazo de sangre?».

languages.text: “这么说，你父亲还是信任你的？你是不是像对血脉亲情一样，对他的信任不屑一顾？”
languages.original_text: "So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"

traits.locale_text: “这么说，你父亲还是信任你的？你是不是像对血脉亲情一样，对他的信任不屑一顾？”

languages.text: « Or donc, vous avez encore la confiance de votre père ? En faites-vous aussi peu de cas que de vos liens de sang ? »
languages.original_text: "So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"

traits.locale_text: « Or donc, vous avez encore la confiance de votre père ? En faites-vous aussi peu de cas que de vos liens de sang ? »

languages.text: "Yani baban sana hâlâ güveniyor mu? Onun güvenine, kan bağlarına verdiğin kadar az mı değer veriyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"

traits.locale_text: "Yani baban sana hâlâ güveniyor mu? Onun güvenine, kan bağlarına verdiğin kadar az mı değer veriyorsun?"

languages.text: "Euer Vater vertraut Euch also noch? Schätzt Ihr sein Vertrauen genauso gering wie Eure Blutsbande?"
languages.original_text: "So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"

traits.locale_text: "Euer Vater vertraut Euch also noch? Schätzt Ihr sein Vertrauen genauso gering wie Eure Blutsbande?"

languages.text: 「父はあなたをまだ信頼しているのですか。血縁ほど、父からの信頼を軽んじるのですか」
languages.original_text: "So, your father still trusts you? Do you value his trust as little as you do your blood ties?"

traits.locale_text: 「父はあなたをまだ信頼しているのですか。血縁ほど、父からの信頼を軽んじるのですか」
